title: Swartzia costata
taxonomy: Swartzia costata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is often found in forests and savannas. Within the genus Swartzia, Swartzia costata belongs to the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes. The family Fabaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Swartzia costata classified within the subfamily Detarioideae. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other species in the family.
